key_concerns: Volatility and downward pressure on gross margins
llm_analysis.notable_language: The Company believes, in general, gross margins will be subject to volatility and downward pressure.
llm_analysis.management_credibility_signals: Direct and transparent about risks and uncertainties

top_negative_sentences: The Company’s future gross margins can be impacted by a variety of factors, as discussed in Part I, Item 1A of this Form 10-K under the heading “Risk Factors.” As a result, the Company believes, in general, gross margins will be subject to volatility and downward pressure.

For a discussion of the Company’s cybersecurity-related risks, see Item 1A of this Form 10-K under the heading “Risk Factors.”
